hero.subtitle: A cross-scenario magnetic ecosystem that transforms every moment — from your desk to your car, your commute to your bedside.

cats_section.title:
Five Ecosystems,
One Magnetic Life
cats_section.desc: Every VIEMAG product belongs to a larger ecosystem, designed to work seamlessly together across all moments of your day.

A.name: Desktop Charging
A.desc: From single chargers to full dock stations — power your devices without compromise.

B.name: Automotive Magnetic
B.desc: Vent mounts, dashboard systems, and motorcycle holders — every drive, hands-free.

C.name: Portable Power
C.desc: Magnetic power banks, travel chargers, and GaN adapters — power wherever you go.

D.name: Stand & Display
D.desc: Desk stands, bedside displays, webcam rigs — your devices, always at the perfect angle.

E.name: Accessory Ecosystem
E.desc: Ring adapters, cases, grips, wallets, and creator modules — extend every device.

scenarios_section.title:
Six Moments,
Seamlessly Connected
scenarios_section.desc: VIEMAG products are organized around the real moments of your life, not arbitrary product categories.

why_section.title:
Built on a Standard.
Designed for Life.

features.title: Qi2 & MagSafe Certified

features.title: Aesthetic Function

brand_page.title:
We Believe in
Magnetic Connection
brand_page.subtitle: Born from the insight that great technology should disappear into daily life — VIEMAG makes magnetic the default action for every moment.
brand_page.mission_desc: VIEMAG was founded on a single conviction: that the friction between people and their devices should be zero. Magnetic charging technology — perfected through MagSafe and the Qi2 standard — gave us the foundation. We built the ecosystem around it.
brand_page.mission_desc2: From the moment you wake up to the moment you arrive at your destination, VIEMAG products are designed to be already there — charged, mounted, ready. No cables to untangle. No searching for the right adapter. Just magnetic, instant connection.

values.title: Magnetic Precision
values.desc: Every product is engineered to the exact MagSafe and Qi2 specification. Precision alignment, maximum efficiency, zero compromise.

values.title: Aesthetic Function
values.desc: We design products that look as good as they perform. Materials, finishes, and forms are chosen to enhance your space, not clutter it.

values.title: Ecosystem Thinking
values.desc: No product is designed in isolation. Every VIEMAG item fits into a larger ecosystem — five categories, six scenarios, one cohesive experience.

values.title: Sustainable Premium
values.desc: Premium is not just about price. It's about materials that last, manufacturing that respects the environment, and products you keep.

brand_page.compat_title:
Built on Open Standards,
Open to Every Device
brand_page.compat_desc: VIEMAG's entire product lineup is built around the open Qi2 wireless charging standard — the same magnetic alignment technology that powers MagSafe. This means VIEMAG works with iPhone, Android devices with Qi2 support, and any MagSafe-compatible accessory.

timeline.title: Brand Foundation
timeline.desc: VIEMAG 唯美格 established as a standalone magnetic ecosystem brand under COMART Corporation.

timeline.title: Product Architecture
timeline.desc: Five ecosystems defined, 75 SKUs mapped, and 13 launch products selected for the market debut.

timeline.title: Market Launch
timeline.desc: First wave of 13 hero SKUs launching across Taiwan and Vietnam, covering commute, office, and travel scenarios.

timeline.title: Full Ecosystem
timeline.desc: Complete 75-SKU lineup available across Asia-Pacific, with expanded B2B distribution network.
